# Custom Watchlist — additional terms to block
#
# Add one term per line. These are merged into the watchlist database
# at build time and persist across container rebuilds.
#
# Use this for:
#   - Customer names not in the auto-generated watchlist
#   - Legal department restricted terms
#   - Project code names or internal identifiers
#   - Any word or phrase that should trigger a block
#
# Lines starting with # are comments and ignored.
# Matching is case-insensitive.
#
# For runtime additions that don't require a rebuild, use the API:
#   curl -s -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
#     -d '{"term":"SomeName","category":"LEGAL"}' \
#     http://localhost:8642/watchlist/custom
